The '''''Bright Nebula''''' was a [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transport]] in service to the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. It was one of three GR-75 medium [[Transport/Legends|transports]] stationed at [[Folor Base]] in [[7 ABY/Legends|7.5 ABY]], and was the second transport to evacuate the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] base during the [[Battle of Folor]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}}
